'''Sacred Arts''' is one of the magic systems of the Willverse.

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Sacred Arts represent a field of practice and knowledge focused on refining the spirit to achieve a connection with all creation. Practitioners use these arts to manipulate the world by utilizing [[madra]], which serves as their internal power and the raw material of souls. This resource can be circulated through a practitioner's limbs, cycled, and refined, though it is subject to exhaustion. As artists advance through various realms, they undergo physical transformations; for example, reaching the [[Iron stage]]—which follows the [[Copper stage]]—allows a practitioner to forge their body, expel impurities, and improve their vision. An [[Iron body]] provides superhuman attributes such as enhanced strength and speed. The ultimate goal of any path is the [[Gold stage]], where a practitioner masters the secrets of [[madra]] to a degree that exceeds mortal dreams, resulting in a body partially composed of [[madra]]. Various disciplines exist within this system, such as the [[Path of the White Fox]], which focuses on cultivating light and dreams to create illusions that twist sound and deceive the senses. Additionally, when powerful humans or animals advance or die, they may leave behind [[Remnants]]. These are living forces made entirely of [[pure madra]] that appear as bright emerald sketches or outlines rather than accurate depictions. Some specific forms, such as a purple skeletal tree-[[Remnant]], exist, and these constructions can even be utilized for tasks like pulling carriages. Specialized practitioners known as [[Soulsmiths]] also have the ability to mold substances or items called [[Remnants]].}}

== Techniques ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[soulfire]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Striker technique]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Ruler technique]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Empty Palm]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Burning Cloak]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Enforcer technique]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Hollow Domain]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[black dragon's breath]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Soul Cloak]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Endless Sword]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Path of Black Flame]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Heart of Twin Stars]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Bloodforged Iron body]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Striker techniques]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Forger technique]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Strings of Shadow]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Consume]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Copper sight]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Soulsmithing]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Void Dragon’s Dance]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Steelborn body]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[dragon’s breath]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Soulfire]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|hunger binding}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Foxfire]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Stellar Spear]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Path of Grasping Sky]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Rippling Sword]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Final Sword]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[The Dragon Descends]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dream of Darkness]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Enforce]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Hollow Spear]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Pure Storm Baptism]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Blood Shadows]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Enforcer techniques]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Full-body Enforcer technique]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Fox Dream]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Ruler techniques]]}}

== Madra & aura ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[hunger madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Forged madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Blackflame madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[dream aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[vital aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[blood madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Wind aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Blood aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[hunger aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|death-madra}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[earth aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|dream madra}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[sword aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[shadow madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[force madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[life madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Storm madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Life aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[White Fox]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|fire aura}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[sword madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[shadow aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Hunger aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Stellar Spear madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[water aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|venomous green madra}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|water madra}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[King’s Key madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|hunger}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|cloud madra}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Twin Stars]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Blood madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|venom aura}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Sword-aspect madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[light aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Sandviper madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|purple madra}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Blackflame aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Endless Sword madra]]}}

== Goldsigns ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Goldsign]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yerin's Goldsigns]]}}

== Sacred arts & Paths ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Sword Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[script-circle]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Grand Oath Array]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[scripts]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[White Fox boundary formation]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Hammer Icon]]}}

== Icons ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Shield Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Bow Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Strength Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Death Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Joy Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Arelius crest]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Oracle Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Crown Icon]]}}

[[Category:Magic systems]]
